shell.unsupportedReason: Current platform does not support shell mode

banner.name: Demo - Homepage Banner Copy
banner.remark: Used to demonstrate custom parameter management. It is not consumed directly by the host runtime.

email.name: Demo - Support Email
email.remark: Used to demonstrate custom parameter management. It is not consumed directly by the host runtime.

logo.name: Branding - App Logo
logo.remark: Controls the default logo URL for the login page and workspace.

name.name: Branding - App Name
name.remark: Controls the browser title, login-page brand name, and workspace logo text.

forgetPasswordEnabled.name: Login - Forget Password Entry
forgetPasswordEnabled.remark: Controls whether the login page shows the forget-password entry. Allowed values: true, false. When false, visiting the forget-password route redirects to login.

loginPanelLayout.name: Login - Panel Layout
loginPanelLayout.remark: Controls the default login panel layout: panel-left, panel-center, or panel-right.

loginSubtitle.name: Login - Form Subtitle
loginSubtitle.remark: Controls the helper copy above the login form.

pageDesc.name: Login - Page Description
pageDesc.remark: Controls the description shown at the top of the login page.

pageTitle.name: Login - Page Title
pageTitle.remark: Controls the headline shown at the top of the login page.

sloganImage.name: Login - Slogan Illustration
sloganImage.remark: Controls the login side-slogan illustration image URL. Supports http(s) or site-absolute paths. Default /slogan.svg is the built-in Vben illustration. Leave empty to hide the illustration.

privacyPolicy.name: Login - Privacy Policy Body
privacyPolicy.remark: Controls the privacy-policy body shown in the registration consent dialog. Multi-line plain text is supported.

registerEnabled.name: Login - Create Account Entry
registerEnabled.remark: Controls whether the login page shows the create-account entry. Allowed values: true, false. When false, visiting the register route redirects to login.

termsOfService.name: Login - Terms of Service Body
termsOfService.remark: Controls the terms-of-service body shown in the registration consent dialog. Multi-line plain text is supported.

retention.name: Scheduled Jobs - Execution Log Retention Policy
retention.remark: Controls the default retention policy for scheduled-job execution logs. Use JSON: {"mode":"days|count|none","value":N}.

enabled.name: Scheduled Jobs - Global Shell Mode Switch
enabled.remark: Controls whether Shell-type jobs can be created, updated, triggered, and stopped. Supported values: true, false.

expire.name: Authentication - JWT Expiration
expire.remark: Controls the lifetime of newly issued JWT tokens using Go duration format such as 12h or 24h.

blackIPList.name: Login - IP Blacklist
blackIPList.remark: Blocks login from IPs or CIDR ranges separated by semicolons.

retentionDays.name: System Logs - Maximum Retention Days
retentionDays.remark: Controls the maximum storage period for system logs, in days. The value must be a positive integer. Default: 90 days.

timeout.name: Online User - Session Timeout
timeout.remark: Controls the inactivity timeout for online sessions using Go duration format such as 30m or 24h.

layout.name: UI - Workspace Layout
layout.remark: Controls the default workspace layout mode.

mode.name: UI - Theme Mode
mode.remark: Controls the default theme mode: light, dark, or auto.

enabled.name: UI - Watermark Enabled
enabled.remark: Controls whether the workspace watermark is enabled.

maxSize.name: File Management - Upload Size Limit
maxSize.remark: Controls the maximum size of a single uploaded file in MB.

defaultAvatar.name: User Management - Default Avatar
defaultAvatar.remark: Controls the fallback avatar URL used when a user has not set an avatar.
